---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#14: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture VII`` (March 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **14**  | 47 | 16/03/2026 | - Sprint#14: ApartmentPredictor  Full-Architecture VII </br></br>  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v4** </br> (2) Pagination and Pageable </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) **Cascade** definition for `Apartment`  </br> </br>  ++ React: MUI React `Pagination`: Stack, Pagination, TableContainer | - [ApartmentPrediction: c30e4d3](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/c30e4d391e40ad3f54aff622595876df6b654b81){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction: 99d9d6d](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/99d9d6d8a14fa95ab83f64072dabec686afa2584){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [orphanremoval-and-cascade](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/sblab8-4.html#orphanremoval-and-cascade){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [Paging and Sorting](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/repositories/query-methods-details.html#repositories.paging-and-sorting){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Pagination](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookPagination/blob/master/docs/pagination.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> [- Pageable: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/BooksPageable){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![userBorrowBookPagination repo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookPagination/refs/heads/master/docs/jparepository.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}</br> - [apartment-predictor_v4.jar](https://albertprofedocs.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/java_jar/apartment-predictor_v4.jar){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [PaginatedBooks.jsx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookFront/blob/master/userBorrowBookFront/src/books/PaginatedBooks.jsx){.external target='_blank'} ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/booksPaginated.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [MUI react-pagination](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-pagination/){.external target='_blank'} |
|   | 48 | 17/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: v4 </br> (2) **Pagination and Pageable** </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) Cascade definition for `Apartment`  </br> </br> - **AWS Cognito Auth**: </br> (1) Create & configure `user pool`  </br> (2) Define MockUp and flow </br> (3) install dependencies & project structure </br></br> - JPA `Specification` from `Criteria` API     | - [ApartmentPrediction: b225da](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/b225daa3e89882231a3e187b9edae1283f1b0c48){.external target='_blank'}   </br> </br> - [Paging and Sorting](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/repositories/query-methods-details.html#repositories.paging-and-sorting){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Pagination](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookPagination/blob/master/docs/pagination.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Pageable: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/BooksPageable){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [repo docs AWS auth](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/master/docs/appends/auth){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [AWS-CognitoReactJS-Auth.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/docs/appends/auth/AWS-CognitoReactJS-Auth.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/refs/heads/master/docs/appends/auth/images/auth-2.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> - [AlbertProfe/authReactCognitoJS Â· GitHub](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/authReactCognitoJS){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [AlbertProfe/authReactCognito Â· GitHub](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/authReactCognito) </br> - [AlbertProfe/authReactCognitoHosted Â· GitHub](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/authReactCognitoHosted){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [JPA-specification-1.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA-specification-1.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [BorrowSpecification.java](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookFilter/blob/master/userBorrowBookFilter/src/main/java/com/example/userBorrowBook/repository/BorrowSpecification.java){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [IBM: Criteria API](https://developer.ibm.com/articles/j-typesafejpa/){.external target='_blank'} |
|   |    | | |
|   | 49 | 19/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) Pagination and Pageable </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) Cascade definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) **Queries**: specification filter for `Apartment` </br></br> - Java & DB: </br> (1) `JDBC` SQL statement as string </br> (2) JPA 1.0: `entityManager` and born Java Persistence Query Language  </br>  (3) JPA 2.0 `jpql` mature, `Criteria` API and `queryDSL` </br> </br> - JPA `Specification` from `Criteria` API    | - [ApartmentPrediction:220120f](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/220120faeeffa92767dd5622b2d173c88d15fe33){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [ApartmentPrediction:b2a3f1d](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/b2a3f1dd94158a57b5bdfd57c8254c1fff32b2f0){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [JPA Query Methods :: Spring Data JPA](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/jpa/query-methods.html#jpa.query-methods.query-creation){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Spring Boot: Lab#SB01-1: DataBase](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/sblab1.html){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Spring Boot: JPA Queries â€“ albertprofe wiki](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/boot-concepts-jpa-4.html){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [2026 Spring Query Report](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA-2026_QueryReport.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [JPA-specification-1.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA-specification-1.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [JPA-specification-2.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA-specification-2.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Plain Apartment specification](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA-specification-Apartment.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/refs/heads/master/docs/screenshots/code-specification-apartment.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc_v5](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/b2a3f1dd94158a57b5bdfd57c8254c1fff32b2f0/docs/ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc_v5.md){.external target='_blank'}|
|   | 50 | 20/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) Pagination and Pageable </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) Cascade definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins</br> </br> - JPQL: derived from name queries   </br> </br>  - Postman Flow: how to automate testing requests   </br></br>  - ApartmentPrediction React: component page for filter| - [ApartmentPrediction: 557a62](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/557a62b94f439da32f3bee5f638a02d06a231177){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [ApartmentPrediction-React: f5f602](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/f5f602ad6ad64fe6427e210d4a8c8d7b41e8fdfe){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [JPA Query Methods :: Spring Data JPA](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/jpa/query-methods.html#jpa.query-methods.query-creation) </br> - [Spring Boot: JPA Queries â€“ albertprofe wiki](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/boot-concepts-jpa-4.html) </br></br> - [Postman Flow: test query](https://flow.pstmn.io/embed/8q0cnU4p4RAQTQ0pnonJp/?frame=false){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/postman-flow.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br></br> - [JavaOne 2026 AI](https://www.youtube.com/live/3fLCOqpIfI0?si=sBF3GGttBTzlobfH){.external target='_blank'}  </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/sql-join.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}|
: Backlog Sprint#14 March 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
